title: MINI-core
description: A modpack that can be used as the base of other modpacks. It has many utility mods, like libraries, and optimization mods.
body:
If you want to check the new iteration of the "MINI-core" check my new modpack - [Expocraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/expocraft) !

---

# **MINI-core Modpack Description**

🎮 Welcome to the MINI-core Modpack! 🚀 This comprehensive collection of mods is designed to take your Minecraft experience to the next level. Whether you're a casual player looking for performance improvements or an aspiring modpack creator, MINI-core has got you covered. 💥

## Features

⚡️ **Optimized Performance**: Enhance your Minecraft experience with performance-boosting mods like Sodium (and friends). Enjoy smoother gameplay, improved graphics, and faster rendering.

🔊 **Enhanced Sounds and Immersion**: Immerse yourself in the Minecraft world with the Ambientsounds mod, which provides realistic audio environments. Enhance your immersion further with mods like Better Animations Collection, Camera Overhaul, and First Person Model, offering improved animations, camera controls, and player perspectives.

📚 **Mod Compatibility and Expansion**: MINI-core supports easy integration with other mods. It comes with popular libraries, allowing you to add additional mods of your choice and expand the possibilities of your Minecraft adventures.

🛠️ **Developer Tools and Debugging**: Boost your productivity with essential mods like Better F3, FPS Display, and Fabric Language Fotlin. These mods provide advanced debugging features and enhanced development capabilities for developers.

❄️ **Seasons and Environmental Changes**: Experience the beauty of changing seasons in Minecraft with the Fabric Seasons mod. Watch as your world transforms with spring, summer, autumn, and winter.

🎮 **Controller Support and Multiplayer Features**: Enjoy playing Minecraft with your preferred controller using the MidnightControls mod. Seamlessly connect and configure your controller for a comfortable gaming experience. Enhance your multiplayer adventures with the Plasmo Voice Mod, enabling voice communication for efficient coordination and teamwork.

🎥 **Youtuber-Friendly Features**: Capture and share your epic Minecraft moments with the ReplayMod, allowing you to record, edit, and showcase your gameplay from different perspectives. Perfect for content creators and YouTubers.

## Installation

🔧 Installing the MINI-core modpack is a breeze, ensuring a hassle-free process for both novice and experienced Minecraft players. You have two options:

1. **Modrinth Installer**: Use the Modrinth Installer, a user-friendly tool that automates the installation process. It streamlines the setup, allowing you to get started in minutes.
1. **Manual Installation**: Alternatively, you can manually unpack the modpack archive. This method provides more control and flexibility, giving experienced players the freedom to customize their installation.

## GitHub (Work in Progress)

🔍 If you're seeking additional information about the modpack, whether you're a developer or a user, you can visit the project's GitHub page. It's an excellent resource for learning more about the modpack's development progress. You can also contribute by reporting bugs and other inconveniences on the issues page. Together, we can make MINI-core even better! 🤝

Feel free to explore the fantastic features of MINI-core and unleash your creativity in the Minecraft universe! 🌟🔥
